title: French Menu - Adding a fixed-price menu
workflow_title: French Menu - Adding a fixed-price menu
source: support.dish.co official article + live form inspection

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, open Products and select French menus.
Enter a name for the French (fixed-price) menu.
Assign the menu to a product group.
Enter the price for the menu.
Finally, send the changes via General, the sub-category General, and Send.
